name: No witnesses to machine injury at work West Valley City, what now?
description: Medical records, logs, your account suffice without witnesses.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to machine injury at work West Valley City, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical records, logs, your account suffice without witnesses.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Use medical records, machine logs, video, your statement—still claimable.** Circumstantial evidence suffices[1][4]. Supervisor reports help. Act quick before evidence gone. Attorney investigates.
